weather.headline: Rain And Snow Showers
weather.detail: Rain and snow showers after 8am. Mostly cloudy. High near 42, with temperatures falling to around 40 in the afternoon. North northeast wind 7 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.
weather.tonight: Chance Snow Showers then Partly Cloudy
